summary: Backend-only HTTP-level integration smoke verifying the routers/seller.py → routers/seller/ package refactor preserved every endpoint. Wrote /app/backend/tests/test_seller_refactor_smoke.py with 39 new tests hitting all 4 submodules (onboarding, listings, orders, analytics) via the public EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL. All 39 pass. Also re-ran the 7 existing seller-related suites (test_seller, test_edit_listing, test_bulk_listings_edges, test_analytics_timeseries, test_analytics_insights, test_seller_business_types, test_seller_payouts) → 105/105 pass. Combined: 144/144 pass. Refactor confirmed behavior-preserving: route parity intact, permission gates (401 unauth / 403 non-seller / 403 unverified-seller) all enforced, response shapes match models, CSV streaming + bulk-edit + analytics windows all working.

minor.issue: Returns 404 — there is no /api/health route. Not related to the seller refactor; just noticed during the smoke.

critical_code_review_comments: routers/seller/__init__.py cleanly re-exposes a single `router` so existing `from routers import seller; seller.router` in server.py still works — refactor is API-compatible.
_common.py centralises require_verified_seller + verify_business_and_persist + COUNTRY_FLAGS — good DRY win, ~20 lines each, no duplication across submodules.
All four submodules use APIRouter(tags=['seller']) so OpenAPI grouping is preserved.
_id is consistently excluded from all Mongo reads — no ObjectId serialisation issues in any submodule.
Bulk edit correctly scopes every operation by seller_id, preventing cross-seller damage.
Each submodule is now well under 500 LOC (listings.py is the largest at ~370 LOC) — good split. Main 1000-line file is gone.
seed_data_creation: Each test creates throwaway TEST_-prefixed sellers/buyers/listings; nothing seeded persistently. No production data touched.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Seller router refactor is verified. Re-use /app/backend/tests/test_seller_refactor_smoke.py for any future seller-router regressions — it covers register/upgrade/me, full listing CRUD, all 7 bulk actions, payouts, orders, CSV streaming, view/cart-add counters, analytics summary, 7/30 day timeseries (incl. clamping), and 30-day insights, plus permission gates (401/403) on every protected endpoint.
rca_of_issue: N/A — no bugs found. Refactor is a clean behavior-preserving package split.
